misc.text: Uno speciale pop-up store di ONE PIECE sta arrivando a Milano, Italia! Dal 26 maggio all’8 giugno 2026, i fan potranno scoprire uno speciale pop-up store di ONE PIECE presso la libreria Mondadori Duomo Milano, con vetrine decorate, prodotti esclusivi e attività per tutti. #ONEPIECE #OP_globalinfo

misc.title: Reebok × DRAGON QUEST シリーズ誕生40周年。二つの伝説が交差する奇跡のコラボレーションが実現 。 歴代11作品を投影したINSTAPUMP FURY 94は5/27(水)より予約開始、VINTAGE TEEは同日販売開始。 🔗：reebok.jp/contents/dragonque… #Reebok #リーボック #ドラゴンクエスト #DRAGONQUEST #DQ40t

misc.title: Mfs in the quotes are too funny man. They say Boruto fans are stupid but aren’t smart enough to tell that this is supposed to be a joke😭😭 #BORUTO | RAIDEN (@BorutoRiden) Wait... Ikemoto is actually
misc.text: Mfs in the quotes are too funny man. They say Boruto fans are stupid but aren’t smart enough to tell that this is supposed to be a joke😭😭 #BORUTO | RAIDEN (@BorutoRiden) Wait... Ikemoto is actually a genius for this. 🤯 I just realized the characters are posing as the volume numbers. #boruto — https://nitter.net/BorutoRiden/status/2056316828218188105#m

misc.title: This confirms it. Because Sarada is posing as the Volume number 6 and Kawaki as the Volume number 7, Ikemoto foreskins that KawaSara will be the Canon ship at the end of the series (6 7) #BORUTO | RAI
